eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 9:00 PM on JUN 30, 2026 Effective until 7:00 AM JUL 1, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Phoenix Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Phoenix Police Department is looking for a white male, Elige Douglas Sluss, 71 years old, approximately 5 feet 7 inches tall and weighing 140 pounds, with gray hair and blue eyes. He walks with the assistance of a maroon walker. Elige was last seen wearing an unknown shirt with blue jeans. Mr. Sluss was last seen in the area of 21st Avenue and Bethany Home Road in the city of Phoenix Arizona. Elige suffers from a medical condition which may cause him to appear confused or easily lost. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
